PPCMCInstLower.cpp
Go to the documentation of this file.
1//===-- PPCMCInstLower.cpp - Convert PPC MachineInstr to an MCInst --------===//
2//
3// The LLVM Compiler Infrastructure
4//
5// This file is distributed under the University of Illinois Open Source
6// License. See LICENSE.TXT for details.
7//
8//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
9//
10// This file contains code to lower PPC MachineInstrs to their corresponding
11// MCInst records.
12//
13//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
14
15#include "PPC.h"
16#include "MCTargetDesc/PPCMCExpr.h"
17#include "PPCSubtarget.h"
18#include "llvm/ADT/SmallString.h"
19#include "llvm/ADT/Twine.h"
20#include "llvm/CodeGen/AsmPrinter.h"
21#include "llvm/CodeGen/MachineFunction.h"
22#include "llvm/CodeGen/MachineModuleInfoImpls.h"
23#include "llvm/IR/DataLayout.h"
24#include "llvm/IR/GlobalValue.h"
25#include "llvm/IR/Mangler.h"
26#include "llvm/MC/MCAsmInfo.h"
27#include "llvm/MC/MCExpr.h"
28#include "llvm/MC/MCInst.h"
29#include "llvm/Target/TargetLowering.h"
30#include "llvm/Target/TargetLoweringObjectFile.h"
31using namespace llvm;
32
33static MachineModuleInfoMachO &getMachOMMI(AsmPrinter &AP) {
34 return AP.MMI->getObjFileInfo<MachineModuleInfoMachO>();
35}
36
37
38static MCSymbol *GetSymbolFromOperand(const MachineOperand &MO, AsmPrinter &AP){
39 const TargetMachine &TM = AP.TM;
40 Mangler *Mang = AP.Mang;
41 const DataLayout *DL = TM.getSubtargetImpl()->getDataLayout();
42 MCContext &Ctx = AP.OutContext;
43 bool isDarwin = Triple(TM.getTargetTriple()).isOSDarwin();
44
45 SmallString<128> Name;
46 StringRef Suffix;
47 if (MO.getTargetFlags() == PPCII::MO_PLT_OR_STUB) {
48 if (isDarwin)
49 Suffix = "$stub";
50 } else if (MO.getTargetFlags() & PPCII::MO_NLP_FLAG)
51 Suffix = "$non_lazy_ptr";
52
53 if (!Suffix.empty())
54 Name += DL->getPrivateGlobalPrefix();
55
56 unsigned PrefixLen = Name.size();
57
58 if (!MO.isGlobal()) {
59 assert(MO.isSymbol() && "Isn't a symbol reference");
60 Mang->getNameWithPrefix(Name, MO.getSymbolName());
61 } else {
62 const GlobalValue *GV = MO.getGlobal();
63 TM.getNameWithPrefix(Name, GV, *Mang);
64 }
65
66 unsigned OrigLen = Name.size() - PrefixLen;
67
68 Name += Suffix;
69 MCSymbol *Sym = Ctx.GetOrCreateSymbol(Name.str());
70 StringRef OrigName = StringRef(Name).substr(PrefixLen, OrigLen);
71
72 // If the target flags on the operand changes the name of the symbol, do that
73 // before we return the symbol.
74 if (MO.getTargetFlags() == PPCII::MO_PLT_OR_STUB && isDarwin) {
75 MachineModuleInfoImpl::StubValueTy &StubSym =
76 getMachOMMI(AP).getFnStubEntry(Sym);
77 if (StubSym.getPointer())
78 return Sym;
79
80 if (MO.isGlobal()) {
81 StubSym =
82 MachineModuleInfoImpl::
83 StubValueTy(AP.getSymbol(MO.getGlobal()),
84 !MO.getGlobal()->hasInternalLinkage());
85 } else {
86 StubSym =
87 MachineModuleInfoImpl::
88 StubValueTy(Ctx.GetOrCreateSymbol(OrigName), false);
89 }
90 return Sym;
91 }
92
93 // If the symbol reference is actually to a non_lazy_ptr, not to the symbol,
94 // then add the suffix.
95 if (MO.getTargetFlags() & PPCII::MO_NLP_FLAG) {
96 MachineModuleInfoMachO &MachO = getMachOMMI(AP);
97
98 MachineModuleInfoImpl::StubValueTy &StubSym =
99 (MO.getTargetFlags() & PPCII::MO_NLP_HIDDEN_FLAG) ?
100 MachO.getHiddenGVStubEntry(Sym) : MachO.getGVStubEntry(Sym);
101
102 if (!StubSym.getPointer()) {
103 assert(MO.isGlobal() && "Extern symbol not handled yet");
104 StubSym = MachineModuleInfoImpl::
105 StubValueTy(AP.getSymbol(MO.getGlobal()),
106 !MO.getGlobal()->hasInternalLinkage());
107 }
108 return Sym;
109 }
110
111 return Sym;
112}
113
114static MCOperand GetSymbolRef(const MachineOperand &MO, const MCSymbol *Symbol,
115 AsmPrinter &Printer, bool isDarwin) {
116 MCContext &Ctx = Printer.OutContext;
117 MCSymbolRefExpr::VariantKind RefKind = MCSymbolRefExpr::VK_None;
118
119 unsigned access = MO.getTargetFlags() & PPCII::MO_ACCESS_MASK;
120
121 switch (access) {
122 case PPCII::MO_TPREL_LO:
123 RefKind = MCSymbolRefExpr::VK_PPC_TPREL_LO;
124 break;
125 case PPCII::MO_TPREL_HA:
126 RefKind = MCSymbolRefExpr::VK_PPC_TPREL_HA;
127 break;
128 case PPCII::MO_DTPREL_LO:
129 RefKind = MCSymbolRefExpr::VK_PPC_DTPREL_LO;
130 break;
131 case PPCII::MO_TLSLD_LO:
132 RefKind = MCSymbolRefExpr::VK_PPC_GOT_TLSLD_LO;
133 break;
134 case PPCII::MO_TOC_LO:
135 RefKind = MCSymbolRefExpr::VK_PPC_TOC_LO;
136 break;
137 case PPCII::MO_TLS:
138 RefKind = MCSymbolRefExpr::VK_PPC_TLS;
139 break;
140 case PPCII::MO_TLSGD:
141 RefKind = MCSymbolRefExpr::VK_PPC_TLSGD;
142 break;
143 case PPCII::MO_TLSLD:
144 RefKind = MCSymbolRefExpr::VK_PPC_TLSLD;
145 break;
146 }
147
148 if (MO.getTargetFlags() == PPCII::MO_PLT_OR_STUB && !isDarwin)
149 RefKind = MCSymbolRefExpr::VK_PLT;
150
151 const MCExpr *Expr = MCSymbolRefExpr::Create(Symbol, RefKind, Ctx);
152
153 if (!MO.isJTI() && MO.getOffset())
154 Expr = MCBinaryExpr::CreateAdd(Expr,
155 MCConstantExpr::Create(MO.getOffset(), Ctx),
156 Ctx);
157
158 // Subtract off the PIC base if required.
159 if (MO.getTargetFlags() & PPCII::MO_PIC_FLAG) {
160 const MachineFunction *MF = MO.getParent()->getParent()->getParent();
161
162 const MCExpr *PB = MCSymbolRefExpr::Create(MF->getPICBaseSymbol(), Ctx);
163 Expr = MCBinaryExpr::CreateSub(Expr, PB, Ctx);
164 }
165
166 // Add ha16() / lo16() markers if required.
167 switch (access) {
168 case PPCII::MO_LO:
169 Expr = PPCMCExpr::CreateLo(Expr, isDarwin, Ctx);
170 break;
171 case PPCII::MO_HA:
172 Expr = PPCMCExpr::CreateHa(Expr, isDarwin, Ctx);
173 break;
174 }
175
176 return MCOperand::CreateExpr(Expr);
177}
178
179void llvm::LowerPPCMachineInstrToMCInst(const MachineInstr *MI, MCInst &OutMI,
180 AsmPrinter &AP, bool isDarwin) {
181 OutMI.setOpcode(MI->getOpcode());
182
183 for (unsigned i = 0, e = MI->getNumOperands(); i != e; ++i) {
184 const MachineOperand &MO = MI->getOperand(i);
185
186 MCOperand MCOp;
187 switch (MO.getType()) {
188 default:
189 MI->dump();
190 llvm_unreachable("unknown operand type");
191 case MachineOperand::MO_Register:
192 assert(!MO.getSubReg() && "Subregs should be eliminated!");
193 MCOp = MCOperand::CreateReg(MO.getReg());
194 break;
195 case MachineOperand::MO_Immediate:
196 MCOp = MCOperand::CreateImm(MO.getImm());
197 break;
198 case MachineOperand::MO_MachineBasicBlock:
199 MCOp = MCOperand::CreateExpr(MCSymbolRefExpr::Create(
200 MO.getMBB()->getSymbol(), AP.OutContext));
201 break;
202 case MachineOperand::MO_GlobalAddress:
203 case MachineOperand::MO_ExternalSymbol:
204 MCOp = GetSymbolRef(MO, GetSymbolFromOperand(MO, AP), AP, isDarwin);
205 break;
206 case MachineOperand::MO_JumpTableIndex:
207 MCOp = GetSymbolRef(MO, AP.GetJTISymbol(MO.getIndex()), AP, isDarwin);
208 break;
209 case MachineOperand::MO_ConstantPoolIndex:
210 MCOp = GetSymbolRef(MO, AP.GetCPISymbol(MO.getIndex()), AP, isDarwin);
211 break;
212 case MachineOperand::MO_BlockAddress:
213 MCOp = GetSymbolRef(MO,AP.GetBlockAddressSymbol(MO.getBlockAddress()),AP,
214 isDarwin);
215 break;
216 case MachineOperand::MO_RegisterMask:
217 continue;
218 }
219
220 OutMI.addOperand(MCOp);
221 }
222}
Name
const char * Name
